risk_if_not_implemented: Without Field Maintenance, AI and autonomous technology risks may go ungoverned, leading to unintended outcomes or exploitation.

compensating_control_1.name: Delivery & Removal
compensating_control_1.description: Physical security mechanisms exist to isolate information processing facilities from points such as delivery and loading areas and other points to avoid unauthorized access.
compensating_control_1.justification: Delivery & Removal (PES-10) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Field Maintenance (MNT-08) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Maintenance Operations
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to develop, disseminate, review & update procedures to facilitate the implementation of maintenance controls across the enterprise.
compensating_control_2.justification: Maintenance Operations (MNT-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Field Maintenance (MNT-08) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
